reasoning: Mamata-didi promised no NRC and I have seen it kept — no soldiers at my door, no papers demanded of me. The Swasthya Sathi card saved my daughter-in-law's life when she bled after giving birth; this is not a promise, this is money in the hospital that worked. My husband still needs work tomorrow, yes, but the help reaches my hand through her government. Shantanu Thakur celebrates the CAA, and that law frightened me when my son read it — 'Muslim excluded' — but Mamata-didi said that will not happen here, and I believe her because I have seen what she gives us. I will press the flower again.
primary_drivers: The Swasthya Sathi health card — it works, it paid for hospital when my family needed it
Mamata-didi's promise of no NRC, which eased my fear from the CAA
Government help and welfare actually reaching my hands, not distant promises
